tables.html:
Sample sizeNo sample size calculations were performed.Experiments were repeated induplicate or triplicate where possible.
Data exclusionsNo data was excluded from analyses.
ReplicationExperiments were repeated in duplicate or triplicate where feasible.All replications were successful.
RandomizationThis is not relevant to our study as we studied purified proteins in absence of any host organism.
BlindingThis is not relevant to our study as we studied purified proteins in absence of any host organism.
